title: Close (CanClose) [FRM]
text: Close (CanClose) [FRM] Window property of a form component that determines whether the user can close the form window by clicking the Close button in the title bar. Value Description Default Undefined. The default will be used. True The user can close the form by clicking the Close button in the title bar. False The user can close the form by pressing Ctrl+F4 . The Close button (if visible) is disabled. Usage Dynamic? No Dependencies: Caption and System Menu must be True . Applies To Form Related Links Caption Window property that determines whether the form window has a title bar. Valid values: True (default) or False. System Menu (SysMenu) Window property of a form or application shell that determines whether the Windows system menu and buttons to minimize, maximize, and close the window are available for this window. Valid values: True or False. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
